questions.text: Riya studies well but her hands feel cold when she opens the exam paper. What would help her most at that moment?

options.text: Read all questions quickly at once
Look around to see how others are doing
Take a short pause and focus on one question

questions.text: Before entering the exam hall, Aarav hears older students talking about how hard the test is. What is the smartest choice for him?

options.text: Remind himself of his own preparation
Leave the area and avoid the exam

questions.text: Meena forgets an answer she studied many times. What helps her brain recall better?

options.text: Stop trying and move on forever
Stay calm and think step by step

questions.text: During the test, Kabir notices his heart beating fast. What action supports his focus?

options.text: Slow breathing while reading the question

questions.text: After finishing early, Sana feels unsure about her answers. What is the most helpful next step?

options.text: Review answers calmly and check mistakes
Worry about what she might have done wrong
